inputs.label: Minimum Value
inputs.businessContext: The minimum value of the range to partition into deciles.

businessContext_i18n.en: The minimum value of the range to partition into deciles.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ondalık dilimlere ayrılacak aralığın minimum değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Mindestwert des Bereichs, der in Dezile unterteilt werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur minimale de la plage à partitionner en déciles.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor mínimo del rango a dividir en deciles.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأدنى للنطاق المراد تقسيمه إلى عشريات.

inputs.label: Maximum Value
inputs.businessContext: The maximum value of the range to partition into deciles.

businessContext_i18n.en: The maximum value of the range to partition into deciles.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ondalık dilimlere ayrılacak aralığın maksimum değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Höchstwert des Bereichs, der in Dezile unterteilt werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur maximale de la plage à partitionner en déciles.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor máximo del rango a dividir en deciles.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأقصى للنطاق المراد تقسيمه إلى عشريات.

inputs.label: Input Value
inputs.businessContext: The value for which to determine the decile.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value for which to determine the decile.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Wert, für den das Dezil bestimmt werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur pour laquelle déterminer le décile.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor para el cual determinar el decil.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة التي سيتم تحديد العشري لها.

inputs.label: Number of Deciles
inputs.businessContext: Total number of decile groups (standard is 10).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of decile groups (standard is 10).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de groupes de déciles (standard est 10).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de grupos de deciles (estándar es 10).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
